blocks.text: Image content is only represented when the DOM exposes alt text, title, aria label, caption, or nearby text.
Image metadata: Floating Ask AI toolbar attached to the browser page edge
The image metadata above is grounded because it comes from DOM-readable attributes, not a vision model guess.
Unknown images must remain unknown and may lower readiness instead of creating unsupported visual claims.
OCR is a future governed input contract and is not executed by the A module in V1.1.

title: image_rich_article
